title: Main Sonar remediation implementation opened
body: No other agents present in active-claims registry at implementation start. Opening implementation for main-critical-sonar-remediation on fix/sonar-fixes-20260506: commit staged rebuild plan first, refresh Sonar evidence, then remediate current Quality Gate blockers with specialist reviews at phase boundaries. Old fix/sonar_high_priority_issues stack remains prior research only; no rebase or cherry-pick replay.
